title: E-commerce Product Grid with Filtering and Shopping Cart

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Grid with Filtering and Shopping Cart

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090A0F'/>
  <rect x='60' y='40' width='280' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='30' y='55' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Search</text>
  <rect x='60' y='120' width='280' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='30' y='135' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Categories</text>
  <rect x='60' y='190' width='280' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='30' y='205' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Price</text>
  <rect x='60' y='250' width='280' height='40' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='10'/>
  <text x='30' y='265' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Cart</text>
  <rect x='20' y='100' width='60' height='60' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='90' y='130' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 1</text>
  <text x='220' y='130' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 2</text>
  <rect x='20' y='150' width='60' height='60' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='90' y='180' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 3</text>
  <text x='220' y='180' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 4</text>
  <rect x='20' y='220' width='60' height='60' fill='#411C56'/>
  <text x='90' y='250' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 5</text>
  <text x='220' y='250' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Product 6</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement filtering functionality with price and category options
Must display total number of items and total price in the shopping cart

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Grid with Filtering and Shopping Cart

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify filtering functionality, search bar, product grid responsiveness, and shopping cart updates.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
